text.bio: Passionate about programming, I have a strong background in various programming languages, including C#, JavaScript, PHP, Node.js, Java,and C++. Additionally, I am well-versed in web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, enabling me to create attractive and functional user interfaces. My expertise extends beyond front-end      development, encompassing both relational databases like MySQL and      SQL Server, and non-relational databases like MongoDB. This     versatility has allowed me to tackle diverse and challenging      projects, providing efficient and effective solutions. I am always      on the lookout for new challenges and opportunities to apply my      technical and creative skills. If you are seeking someone who brings experience and passion to the team, I would be delighted to connect with you.
